allow: Bash(node -e "const {resolve} = require\('path'\); const {readFileSync} = require\('fs'\); try { const p = resolve\('./src/content/settings/site.json'\); console.log\('Path:', p\); console.log\('Exists?', readFileSync\(p,'utf-8'\).slice\(0,50\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('ERROR:', e.code, e.message\); }")
Bash(node --experimental-vm-modules -e "import\('./astro.config.mjs'\).then\(c => console.log\('OK:', typeof c.default\)\).catch\(e => console.log\('ERR:', e.message\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const {resolve} = require\('path'\); const {existsSync} = require\('fs'\); const p = resolve\('./src/content/settings/site.json'\); console.log\('cwd:', process.cwd\(\)\); console.log\('Path:', p\); console.log\('Exists:', existsSync\(p\)\);")
